title: Audit Log Schema
description: Schema for audit log entries in deepSightAI Trinetra

user_id.description: ID of the user who performed the action (or system)

action.description: Type of action performed (e.g., CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT)

type.description: Resource type (e.g., video, user, api_key, tenant, frame)

id.description: Resource identifier (UUID or other unique ID)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the action occurred

ip_address.description: IP address from which the request originated

user_agent.description: User agent string from the client (optional)

request_id.description: Correlation ID for tracing the request through the system (optional)

changes.description: List of changes made (for UPDATE actions)

field.description: Name of the field that changed

error_message.description: Error message if outcome is FAILURE (optional)

metadata.description: Additional metadata specific to the action
